LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO JULY-02-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA JOHNSON'S MOTION TO VACATE RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO VACATE RENEWAL OF THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED IN THIS MATTER IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY PROVIDES EVIDENCE THAT SHE WAS NEVER SERVED WITH PROCESS IN THIS CASE. THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR DOES NOT OPPOSE. THE COURT EXERCISES ITS EQUITABLE POWER AND VACATES RENEWAL OF THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT. ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA JOHNSON's Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to vacate renewal of the default judgment entered in this matter is granted. Moving party provides evidence that she was never served with process in this case. The judgment creditor does not oppose. The court exercises its equitable power and vacates renewal of the default judgment.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA JOHNSON'S Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Default Judgment.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Moving party Christina Johnson's motion to vacate renewal of default judgment is ordered off calendar as untimely filed and served. A noticed motion must be filed and served at least 16 court days in advance of the hearing (and court days excludes any court holidays). That filing and service period is extended by five calendar days where the motion is served by first-class mail within California, as Johnson served her motion here. (See Code of Civil Procedure 1005(b).)

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
